# TS9215

**Category:** Macro Syntax · **Severity:** Error

## Message

```
@operator must be inside a class declaration
```

## Explanation

The @operator decorator registers a method as an operator implementation.
It must be placed on a method inside a class.

Correct:
  class Vector {
    @operator("+")
    add(other: Vector): Vector { ... }
  }

<!-- prettier-ignore-end -->
<!-- generated:end -->
